name: aurora-ai-tool
title: Aurora AI Tool
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora-native tool parity surface from AI Elements.

files.content:
"use client"

export { ToolCalls as Tool } from "@/registry/aurora/blocks/tool-calls/tool-calls"

docs:
Aurora block that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ai/tool.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`, `aurora-tool-calls`.
